channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ryan Gosling Has 'Hi' Times in London, Plus Kate Middleton, Prince William, Oprah and More
item.description: From L.A. to Paris, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Cody Simpson Recalls Romances with Kylie Jenner, 'First Love' Gigi Hadid and Why He'll 'Always Be Grateful' for Miley Cyrus
item.description: The Australian singer opened up about his famous exes during a podcast appearance on Tuesday, March 10

item.title: Sofía Vergara Copied Oprah’s Go-To Outfit Formula in a Comfy Lounge Set — and We Spotted a Lookalike Under $30
item.description: Matching sets are a celebrity favorite

item.title: Scarlett Johansson's Sleeveless Sweater Is the Breezy Base Layer That Lends Itself to So Many Spring Outfits
item.description: It's a wardrobe staple you'll reach for in all seasons

item.title: Joanna Gaines' Vintage-Looking Rug Warmed Up My Space and Looks Like New in My High-Traffic Home — Grab It on Sale
item.description: Bonus: It's available in accent, area, and runner sizes

item.title: Macaulay Culkin & Brenda Song Purchase L.A. Area Home for $10.3M
item.description: Macaulay Culkin and Brenda Song are turning the page -- the couple just dropped a cool $10.3 million on a new home in the L.A. area, TMZ has learned. ...

item.title: Jasmine Crockett's Failed Senate Campaign Expenses Revealed

item.title: Jack White Says It's Boring to Write Songs About Breakups Like Taylor Swift
item.description: You won't catch Jack White taking a page out of Taylor Swift's playbook when it comes to songwriting ... because the White Stripes frontman says penni...

item.title: Anwar Hadid Files Restraining Order, Claims Woman Broke Into His Bedroom While He Slept
item.description: Anwar Hadid -- the brother of Gigi and Bella Hadid -- claims a woman he blocked online escalated from persistent social media messages to allegedly st...

item.title: '90 Day Fiancé' Star Eric Rosenbrook Hires Private Medical Examiner, Slams 'Non-Accidental' Baby Death Ruling
item.description: Eric Rosenbrook is pushing back hard on the official findings in his baby daughter's death ... and TMZ has learned he and Leida Margaretha have hired ...
